response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer, but his background fundamentally misaligns with the core requirements of this role. The position mandates 5-10 years of strong hands-on C++ development on Windows and deep Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain expertise. Bogdan's career has primarily focused on JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief 7-month stint using C++ nearly a decade ago, making him unsuitable for this specialized C++ financial backend role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong track record in senior and staff-level roles.
Solid background in modern software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and microservices.
Has some relevant financial technology exposure from his time at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, having only 7 months of professional C++ experience from 2014.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform C++ development or heavy SQL Server/Oracle usage.
Missing required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income systems.
